assessment.note: He names ongoing uncertainty about what good looks like week to week, signaling strong disengagement risk; also reveals a clear clarity gap worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Expectation drift
new_queue.name: Where have expectations felt the least clear for you so far?
new_queue.description: Surfaces which parts of the role are still fuzzy without assuming failure.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?
new_queue.description: Intentionally open; lets them name the thing before the manager assumes.

new_queue.label: Proving yourself
new_queue.name: Where do you feel the most pressure to prove yourself right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces self-imposed pressure and where it shows up in the work.

new_queue.label: Support that helps
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would make the biggest difference right now?
new_queue.description: Moves toward practical support without reopening diagnosis or blame.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete next-step support and stabilisation.
